question: The chart shows quarterly customer support tickets for the current year and the first two quarters of the next year. Based on the data values, which of the following statements is correct?

options.A: Q4 has the second-highest number of tickets among all the quarters shown.
options.B: Q2 (next year) has more tickets than Q4.
options.C: Q3 has the lowest number of tickets among all the quarters shown.
options.D: Q1 (next year) has around three times as many tickets as Q3, as suggested by its bar size.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
